homepage.title: Spezialisten im Bereich Rollieren und Diamant-Glätten - Baublies [EN]
homepage.description: Optimierte Oberflächen durch Glätten und Verfestigen: Seit fast 50 Jahren widmen wir uns der Optimierung metallischer Oberflächen durch Rollieren, Glattwalzen und Diamant-Glätten und haben uns in dieser Zeit zu einem der Technologieführer entwickelt. Mit den Werkzeugen der Baublies AG erzeugen Sie einfach und …
homepage.text_excerpt:
Spezialisten im Bereich Rollieren und Diamant-Glätten - Baublies [EN]
Headquarter Renningen
We'll smooth it out!
Optimized Surfaces through burnishing and strain hardening with Baublies roller burnishing tools.
Tools
Multi-roller burnishing tools
Depending on the rolling task, the tool contains several carbide rollers
read more
Single-roller burnishing tools
For burnishing and hardening using a carbite roller that selectively applies pressure to the surface.
read more
Tailor made tools
Some challenges are unique
read more
Forming tools
The right connection
read more
Diamond burnishing tools
Hard and versatile: Burnishing and hardening in new dimensions
read more
Advantages of roller burnishing technology
Finishing in a single clamping eliminates the need for special machines. Production is simplified, and setup, storage, and transport costs are reduced.
The robust tools increase process reliability. Rolling can be easily and reliably integrated into production processes.
Compared to machining processes, there is a significant improvement in material properties such as roughness, strength, hardness, and wear resistance.
Rolling does not result in any material removal. This means that there is no grinding dust or sludge and, of course, no associated disposal costs.
Roller burnishing is characterized by short processing times and a significant increase in product quality, thereby making a noticeable contribution to cost-effectiveness and, beyond that, to the development of a positive image.
Would you like to know more about rolling technology? You can find answers to your questions here.
